title: Completed requests for disclosure of confidential business information under s21.1(3)(c) of the Food and Drugs Act - Open Government Portal
content:
## Completed requests for disclosure of confidential business information under s21.1(3)(c) of the Food and Drugs Act
The list below summarizes completed requests for Health Canada to use its authority to disclose confidential business information (CBI).
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Health Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
